title: Require Agent Plugin Command Channel Topology
forbids: a second controller runtime projection, a second curated command namespace, nested command aliases, or external-extension commands under the curated channel
why: Controller reachability and command authority are closed axes: one lifecycle projection binds the service, curated lifecycle is under rawr agent plugins, and external Oclif extension management is under rawr plugins.
remediate: Keep controller projection code under the declared service-runtime roots, curated commands under agent/plugins, vendor commands under agent/plugins/vendors, and external extension commands under plugins.
message: Agent-plugin controller projection and command channels must remain in their closed topology.
